description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FBGEMM GPU/GenAI/HSTU CUDA Test that tests and optionally publishes CUDA wheels to PyPI. The workflow takes several inputs, including a matrix, repository reference, extra environment variables, PyTorch channel and version, and a flag to publish to PyPI. It uses a matrix strategy to run on multiple hosts with different configurations, checks out the repository, downloads a wheel artifact, sets up NVIDIA drivers and Docker runtime, and tests the FBGEMM GPU modules with PyTest. If specified, it also publishes the wheel to PyPI.
